data.title: HyOrc advocates green methanol for shipping's decarbonization with economic benefits. #sustainableShipping #greenFuel
data.description: The recent report states that the unemployment rate in the country has reached a record low of 3.8%, the lowest in the past two decades. This decrease in unemployment has led to the creation of over 200,000 new jobs in various sectors. The economy has seen significant growth with a GDP increase of 4.2% in the last quarter, exceeding expectations. The stock market has also experienced a positive trend, with the main indexes showing a 10% increase in the past month. These positive indicators point towards a strong and thriving economy with potential for further growth in the near future.

data.title: China's economy sees a significant shift with a deepening investment slump. Manufacturing, infrastructure, and property investment expected to decline.
data.description: This year, there is projected to be a decrease in investment in manufacturing, infrastructure, and property. This shift is significant considering the economy's previous growth, which had a global impact.

data.title: Paramount offers unlimited funds for Warner acquisition with Larry Ellison, but Warner doubts his personal guarantee.
data.description: Larry Ellison is providing backing for Paramount's offer to acquire Warner Brothers. However, Warner Brothers is worried because Ellison has not offered a personal assurance to cover the costs.

data.title: Bank denies refund after tech support scammers swipe $85,000 from retiree in rising online fraud trend. Criminals wired funds from his account.
data.description: A recently retired lawyer fell victim to a tech support scam, which is a rapidly growing form of online fraud. The scam resulted in a loss of a significant sum of money. Despite efforts made by Citibank, the funds could not be recovered as the criminals behind the scam had successfully transferred the money from the lawyer's account.

data.title: Bonnie Brennan aims to attract clients in high-end auctions as more people tune into the "theater".
data.description: Bonnie Brennan is capitalizing on the growing interest in high-end auctions, leveraging the theatrical aspect to attract more viewers. With an eye on converting these viewers into clients, she aims to tap into the lucrative market associated with this trend.

data.title: Oklahoma oil tycoon Harold Hamm partners with President Trump to shape US energy policy.
data.description: Oklahoma oil magnate Harold Hamm has significantly influenced energy policy by forming a partnership with President Trump.

data.title: Upbit hack questions Binance's freeze policy. Only around 17% funds linked to hack were reportedly frozen. Major exchanges' actions scrutinized.
data.description: Allegedly, Binance has frozen approximately 17% of the funds connected to the Upbit hack as identified by South Korean authorities. This has sparked inquiries into the protocols followed by major exchanges when cooperating with international law enforcement agencies.

data.title: UAB Merko Statyba submitted best bid for parts B and C in the Rudninkai Polygon public procurement for military infrastructure development.
data.description: According to a report from Lithuanian business publication Verslo Žinios, UAB Merko Statyba, a subsidiary of AS Merko Ehitus, has presented the top offer for sections B and C in the public tender for the "Enhancement of the military infrastructure at the Rūdninkai polygon via a public-private partnership".

data.title: New ez1099 2025 software from Halfpricesoft includes efile service, saves time for customers. Redmond, Dec 12, 2025.
data.description: Halfpricesoft.com developers have recently launched the 2025 edition of ez1099 software in REDMOND, Wash. The updated software now includes a new efile add-on service, providing customers with a time-saving feature. This latest release aims to streamline the tax filing process for users.

data.title: Orphalan acquires Orphelia Pharma, specializing in treating rare pediatric diseases like neurology and oncology.
data.description: A global pharmaceutical company, Orphalan, focused on orphan drug development, has recently purchased Orphelia Pharma, a firm dedicated to treating rare and severe pediatric illnesses in neurology and oncology. This acquisition marks a significant move in the industry and highlights Orphalan's commitment to addressing unmet medical needs. The deal is valued at a substantial amount, though exact figures have not been disclosed. This strategic decision is expected to greatly enhance Orphalan's portfolio and expand its reach within the rare disease treatment sector, particularly for pediatric patients.
